import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/views/course/CourseView.vue");/* unplugin-vue-components disabled */import { ElLoadingDirective as __unplugin_directives_0 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_loading_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";

import { ElDivider as __unplugin_components_7 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_divider_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";
import { ElProgress as __unplugin_components_6 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_progress_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";
import { ElEmpty as __unplugin_components_5 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_empty_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";
import { ElInput as __unplugin_components_4 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_input_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";
import { ElRadioGroup as __unplugin_components_3 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_radio-group_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";
import { ElRadioButton as __unplugin_components_2 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_radio-button_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";
import { ElTag as __unplugin_components_1 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_tag_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";
import { ElIcon as __unplugin_components_0 } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_base_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";import "/node_modules/.vite/deps/element-plus_es_components_icon_style_css.js?v=b5f40d3d";
import { onMounted, ref, watch } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/vue.js?v=b5f40d3d"
import CourseCard from "/src/components/common/CourseCard.vue"
import LazyImage from "/src/components/common/LazyImage.vue"
import { getCourseListApi, getCourseDetailApi } from "/src/api/course.js"
import { debounce } from "/src/utils/debounce.js"
import { Search, BookOpen, Medal } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/@element-plus_icons-vue.js?v=b5f40d3d"


const _sfc_main = {
  __name: 'CourseView',
  setup(__props, { expose: __expose }) {
  __expose();

const loading = ref(false)
const courses = ref([])
const categories = ref([])
const category = ref('all')
const keyword = ref('')

const drawerVisible = ref(false)
const detailLoading = ref(false)
const courseDetail = ref(null)

async function fetchList() {
  loading.value = true
  try {
    const res = await getCourseListApi({
      category: category.value === 'all' ? '' : category.value,
      keyword: keyword.value,
    })
    courses.value = res.data.list
    categories.value = res.data.categories || []
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

const debouncedSearch = debounce(() => {
  fetchList()
}, 400)

watch(keyword, () => {
  debouncedSearch()
})

watch(category, () => {
  fetchList()
})

onMounted(fetchList)

async function openDetail(course) {
  drawerVisible.value = true
  detailLoading.value = true
  courseDetail.value = null
  try {
    const res = await getCourseDetailApi(course.id)
    courseDetail.value = res.data
  } finally {
    detailLoading.value = false
  }
}

const __returned__ = { loading, courses, categories, category, keyword, drawerVisible, detailLoading, courseDetail, fetchList, debouncedSearch, openDetail, onMounted, ref, watch, CourseCard, LazyImage, get getCourseListApi() { return getCourseListApi }, get getCourseDetailApi() { return getCourseDetailApi }, get debounce() { return debounce }, get Search() { return Search }, get BookOpen() { return BookOpen }, get Medal() { return Medal } }
Object.defineProperty(__returned__, '__isScriptSetup', { enumerable: false, value: true })
return __returned__
}

}
import { createCommentVNode as _createCommentVNode, createVNode as _createVNode, resolveComponent as _resolveComponent, withCtx as _withCtx, createElementVNode as _createElementVNode, toDisplayString as _toDisplayString, createTextVNode as _createTextVNode, renderList as _renderList, Fragment as _Fragment, openBlock as _openBlock, createElementBlock as _createElementBlock, createBlock as _createBlock, resolveDirective as _resolveDirective, withDirectives as _withDirectives } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/vue.js?v=b5f40d3d"

const _hoisted_1 = { class: "page-container course-page" }
const _hoisted_2 = { class: "page-hero" }
const _hoisted_3 = { class: "page-hero__content" }
const _hoisted_4 = { class: "page-badge" }
const _hoisted_5 = { class: "page-actions" }
const _hoisted_6 = { class: "filter-panel" }

  key: 0,

}

const _hoisted_18 = { class: "chapter-title" }
const _hoisted_19 = { class: "chapter-duration" }

function _sfc_render(_ctx, _cache, $props, $setup, $data, $options) {

        _cache[5] || (_cache[5] = _createElementVNode("p", { class: "page-subtitle" }, "åç°éåä½ çå­¦ä¹ èµæºï¼å¼å¯æ°çå­¦ä¹ æç¨", -1 /* CACHED */)),
        _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_5, [
          _createVNode(_component_el_tag, {
            size: "large",
            type: "primary"
          }, {
            default: _withCtx(() => [
              _createVNode(_component_el_icon, null, {
                default: _withCtx(() => [
                  _createVNode($setup["Medal"])
                ]),
                _: 1 /* STABLE */
              }),
              _createTextVNode(" " + _toDisplayString($setup.courses.length) + " é¨è¯¾ç¨ ", 1 /* TEXT */)
            ]),
            _: 1 /* STABLE */
          })
        ])
      ])
    ]),
    _createCommentVNode(" ç­éåºå "),

      _createElementVNode("div", _hoisted_7, [
        _createVNode(_component_el_radio_group, {
          modelValue: $setup.category,
          "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[0] || (_cache[0] = $event => (($setup.category) = $event)),
          size: "default",
          class: "category-radio-group"

          default: _withCtx(() => [
            (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList($setup.categories, (cat) => {

    _createCommentVNode(" è¯¾ç¨å¡çç½æ ¼ "),
    _withDirectives((_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_8, [

        return (_openBlock(), _createBlock($setup["CourseCard"], {
          key: course.id,

          class: "course-page__card",
          onClick: $setup.openDetail

      }), 128 /* KEYED_FRAGMENT */))
    ])), [
      [_directive_loading, $setup.loading]
    ]),
    (!$setup.loading && !$setup.courses.length)
      ? (_openBlock(), _createBlock(_component_el_empty, {
          key: 0,
          description: "ææ è¯¾ç¨",
          class: "empty-state"
        }))
      : _createCommentVNode("v-if", true),
    _createCommentVNode(" è¯¾ç¨è¯¦ææ½å± "),

      modelValue: $setup.drawerVisible,
      "onUpdate:modelValue": _cache[2] || (_cache[2] = $event => (($setup.drawerVisible) = $event)),

      "destroy-on-close": "",
      class: "course-drawer"

      header: _withCtx(() => [...(_cache[6] || (_cache[6] = [

      ]))]),
      default: _withCtx(() => [
        _withDirectives((_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_9, [
          ($setup.courseDetail)
            ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, { key: 0 }, [

                  src: $setup.courseDetail.cover,
                  alt: $setup.courseDetail.title,

                _createElementVNode("p", _hoisted_11, _toDisplayString($setup.courseDetail.description), 1 /* TEXT */),
                _createElementVNode("p", _hoisted_12, " è®²å¸ï¼" + _toDisplayString($setup.courseDetail.teacher) + " Â· " + _toDisplayString($setup.courseDetail.lessons) + " è¯¾æ¶ ", 1 /* TEXT */),

                  ? (_openBlock(), _createElementBlock("div", _hoisted_13, [
                      (_openBlock(true), _createElementBlock(_Fragment, null, _renderList($setup.courseDetail.knowledgePoints, (kp) => {
                        return (_openBlock(), _createBlock(_component_el_tag, {

import "/src/views/course/CourseView.vue?vue&type=style&index=0&scoped=97f1cd65&lang.scss"

_sfc_main.__hmrId = "97f1cd65"
typeof __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__ !== 'undefined' && __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.createRecord(_sfc_main.__hmrId, _sfc_main)
import.meta.hot.on('file-changed', ({ file }) => {
  __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.CHANGED_FILE = file
})
import.meta.hot.accept(mod => {
  if (!mod) return
  const { default: updated, _rerender_only } = mod
  if (_rerender_only) {
    __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.rerender(updated.__hmrId, updated.render)
  } else {
    __VUE_HMR_RUNTIME__.reload(updated.__hmrId, updated)
  }
})
import _export_sfc from "/@id/__x00__plugin-vue:export-helper"
export default /*#__PURE__*/_export_sfc(_sfc_main, [['render',_sfc_render],['__scopeId',"data-v-97f1cd65"],['__file',"E:/MyCode/JavaCode/webprojectcode/src/views/course/CourseView.vue"]])
//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
